title: MineMania
description: a beta access for my mod i am currently working on, essentially a remake for orespawn mod but for 1.20.1
body:
This is currently a beta release, any bugs or issues please post as i comment here so i can view it and fix them, i am relatively new to coding, so be kind if there are issues

this mod is a remake of the orespawn mod for 1.7.10 made by TheyCallMeDanger, except names are changed and all mobs and textures are to be remade by me, 

the difference between this and the ChaosAwakens Mod, which i understand will be a lot better than this mod, is that i plan for this mod to keep the original basic feel that orespawn had, with simple animations, basic minecraft attacks, nothing too complicated, yes this is also because i am not that skilled but when i played with chaos awakens it didnt have the same feel orespawn had so i made this

i will be working on a few things like some sort of wiki, whether on here or somewhere else, maybe a custom book as a wiki aswell, just so people can know what is currently in the game, some naming of a few things are incorrect, ignore that it will be fixed by the next update

currently the models are made completely by me, other than the rhino in which all credits go to kaupenjoe on youtube, however the model will be changed out for the cephadrome once i make that

please keep in mind i am only 1 person, and still in school so i apologise for any wait and my lack of professionalism.

here is a perm invite link to my discord server, there will be a custom chat for mod bugs and mod information

https://discord.gg/e8JgrUKj6b
